name: CHEERWIN GRP. -,0000002
summary: Cheerwin Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, designs, develops, manufactures, and sells household care, personal care, and pet care products in China. The company offers household cleaning products, such as toilet cleaners, kitchen cleaners, antibacterial sachets, and household disinfectant liquids; personal care products, including hand sanitizers, soaps, and mosquito repellents; and pet care products. The company offers its products under the Vewin, Superb, Babeking, Cyrin, Rikiso, Naughty Buddy, and Dux brand names. Cheerwin Group Limited was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.
